  PR Title format: 🐛 fix(<scope>): <short description>
  Example: 🐛 fix(ci): correct label sync token permissions
  Use 🔒 fix(<scope>): ... for security fixes.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title: `🐛 fix(<scope>): <description>` (or `🔒 fix(<scope>): ...` for security)
- [ ] Labels applied: `bug` (+ `security` if applicable)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
